overall.description: A first-person scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a street food stall in a neon-lit urban market. The clip begins with the player seated at a table observing a character in a yellow jacket, then transitions to the player standing and moving into the enclosed food preparation area of the stall.

hooded pedestrian stands up and exits to the left

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a static view from a covered street-side table in a cyberpunk market. Across the table sits a character in a bright yellow jacket drinking and gesturing. A hooded pedestrian briefly enters, sits, and exits. Neon signs for Pharmaceuti-Kola and Jacked & Coke illuminate the background street.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior food preparation stall with cooking equipment

events.description: camera moves left from the outdoor dining table into the enclosed food stall interior
brief passage through darker interior corner before emerging into lit preparation area

agents.ego_description: standing up and moving into the interior of the food stall, exploring the preparation area behind the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the preparation counter facing the street window

entered.detail: metal counter with food preparation items, containers, and utensils
industrial grill and cooking station with metal surfaces and ventilation
tall shelving units holding supplies and boxes along the back wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves left into the enclosed interior of the food stall, transitioning from the dining area to the preparation space. A vendor stands at the counter facing the street. The space features cooking equipment, storage shelves, and artificial lighting, with the neon street signs now visible only through the front opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a public dining area in a neon-lit market into the enclosed interior of a street food stall. It begins with a static view from a covered table, observing a character in a bright yellow jacket gesturing while neon signs for Pharmaceuti-Kola and Jacked & Coke glow in the background street. As a hooded pedestrian briefly sits and departs, the camera shifts left, gliding away from the dining space and crossing the threshold into the stall's preparation area. The scene then opens into a cramped workspace filled with cooking equipment and storage shelves, where a vendor stands at the counter. Finally, the perspective settles within the artificial lighting of the interior, leaving the vibrant neon street signs visible only through the narrow front opening.
